name: GitHub repositories should not have open critical Dependabot alerts
description: Repositories with open critical GitHub Dependabot security alerts
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where GitHub reports open critical Dependabot security alerts for vulnerable dependencies.

### Assessment context

Cyscale imports the GitHub alert metadata through the GitHub App installation and assesses the repository as failing while one or more critical Dependabot alerts remain open.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Review the Dependabot alert in GitHub, upgrade the affected dependency or remove it, and merge the fix after tests pass. If the alert is not exploitable, dismiss it in GitHub with a documented reason.
